1200002156.english: The first is for the ground forces to reach the Tower of Iron and detonate it from within.
1200002156.korean: 첫 번째는 지상군이 철의 탑에 도달 후 내부에서 폭파.

1200002157.english: The second is the Doom Bringer's bombardment.

1200002158.english: The third is high-altitude bombing by the Haka.

1200002159.english: We are currently finalizing the agreement for the Haka rental, but as soon as it's done, we will load the Haka with bombs and have the Sky Knights and Doom Bringers board, then move toward the Iron Tower.
1200002159.korean: 지금 하카 대여에 대해 합의하는 중이지만 합의가 끝나는 대로 하카에 폭탄을 적재하고 스카이 나이츠와 둠 브링어가 탑승하여 철의 탑 상공으로 이동합니다.

1200002160.english: First and foremost, the Hakka will attempt to bomb from high altitude, and if bombing is impossible or fails to destroy the target, the Doom Bringer will attempt the bombing. If this also fails, they will mobilize all resources to allow the ground forces to reach the Iron Tower.
1200002160.korean: 최우선적으로 하카로 고고도에서 폭격을 시도 한 후 폭격이 불가능하거나 파괴에 실패하면 둠 브링어가 폭격을 시도합니다. 이 역시도 실패하면 지상군이 철의 탑에 도달할 수 있게 모든 자원을 동원합니다.

1200002161.english: Our mission is to escort the Haka and Doom Bringers and intercept the Iron Blooded that pose a threat to them.
1200002161.korean: 우리들의 임무는 하카 및 둠 브링어의 호위 및 하카와 둠 브링어에 위협이 되는 철충을 요격하는 것입니다.

1200002162.english: The expected risks are flying Metal Parasites and Metal Parasite surface-to-air weapons.
1200002162.korean: 예상되는 위험은 비행형 철충과 철충의 지대공 병기입니다.

1200002163.english: Since Haka is an airship and therefore vulnerable to external impacts, understanding the range of the Metal Parasite's air defense network is also part of the mission.
1200002163.korean: 하카가 비행선인 관계로 외부의 충격에 취약하기에 철충의 방공망의 범위를 파악하는 것도 임무에 포함됩니다.

1200002164.english: The operation will commence as soon as the bombs are loaded in Haka and the Sky Knights and Doom Bringers are on board.
1200002164.korean: 작전은 하카에 폭탄의 적재와 스카이 나이츠, 둠 브링어의 탑승이 끝나는 대로 개시할 것입니다.

1200002165.english: Each individual's detailed mission is the same as when we trained in coordination with the Doom Bringers, and it may change depending on the situation on the battlefield, so please pay close attention to communications.
1200002165.korean: 각자의 상세 임무는 둠 브링어와 공조 훈련을 했던 때와 동일하며 전장의 상황에 따라 변동될 수 있으니 통신에 귀 기울여 주십시오.

1200002167.english: What if I can't rent a haka?
1200002167.korean: 만약에 하카를 대여하지 못하면 어떻게 해?

1200002168.english: Then we'll have to formulate a new plan.

1200002169.english: How long does it take to get from here to the Iron Tower?
1200002169.korean: 여기에서 철의 탑까지 이동하는데 걸리는 시간은?

1200002170.english: I haven't been able to determine the detailed specifications, but I expect it to be between 12 and 24 hours.
1200002170.korean: 상세 스펙을 파악하지 못했지만 12시간 이상 24시간 이내로 예상됩니다.

1200002171.english: We will share the detailed specifications again once they are confirmed later.
1200002171.korean: 후에 상세 스펙이 파악되면 다시 전파하겠습니다.

1200002172.english: Do we have anything to do while riding the haka?
1200002172.korean: 하카에 타고 이동 중에 우리가 할 일은 있어?

1200002173.english: Please wait inside the Haka, following the instructions of the Haka crew. On the contrary, if we go outside, there's a chance Haka will be discovered.
1200002173.korean: 하카 승조원의 안내에 따라 하카 내부에서 대기합니다. 오히려 우리가 밖으로 나갈 경우 하카가 발각될 확률이 있습니다.

1200002176.english: No... rumor has it... that Fafnir, the owner of that airship, is such an idiot that he wouldn't lose to Sleipnir...
1200002176.korean: 아니… 소문으로는… 그 비행선 주인이라는 파프니르가 슬레이프니르에 지지 않을 정도로 바보라고 하던데…

1200002177.english: Why me, who's just standing still!

1200002178.english: What if a fool does something foolish?

1200002180.english: How can a normal person predict the actions of a fool?
1200002180.korean: 바보가 하는 행동을 평범한 사람이 어떻게 예측하겠어?

1200002181.english: Hmm... what if we move all the way to the operation area and then Fafnir suddenly refuses to participate?
1200002181.korean: 음… 만약에 작전 상공까지 이동했는데 파프니르가 갑자기 안 하겠다고 하면 어쩌지?

1200002182.english: I'll have to hope that doesn't happen.

1200002183.english: But if something like that were to happen...

1200002187.english: Hey! I'm not buying you anything more today!

1200002188.english: Then I'll buy it for you tomorrow.

1200002189.english: What did you do to Sterling?

1200002191.english: Sterling went back to the Haka with a furious look on his face, cursing, "You stupid idiot!"
1200002191.korean: 스털링이 잔뜩 화 난 표정으로 '병신 같은 빡대가리 년!'이라고 욕하면서 하카로 돌아갔어.

1200002193.english: Why is the premise that I did something wrong?

1200002194.english: No, that goes too, but why do you think I'm the target of that insult?
1200002194.korean: 아니, 그것도 그렇고 그 욕의 대상이 왜 나라고 생각하는 거야?

1200002195.english: Well… the Captain is the only one who can make Sterling that angry.
1200002195.korean: 그야… 스털링을 그렇게 화나게 할 수 있는 사람은 대장뿐이니까.

1200002198.english: That's right. Because he's the boss.

1200002199.english: What do you guys usually think of me...
1200002199.korean: 너희들 평소에 날 어떻게 생각하고 있는 거야…

1200002201.english: Are you confident? Are you confident you won't cry?
1200002201.korean: 자신 있어? 안 울 자신 있어?

1200002202.english: I saved their life, fed them, sheltered them, protected them, and bought them all sorts of things...
1200002202.korean: 살려주고, 먹여주고, 재워주고, 보호해주고, 이것저것 사줬더니…

1200002204.english: I guess we got too excited.

1200002205.english: But seriously, what did you do to Sterling?
1200002205.korean: 그런데 진짜 스털링한테 무슨 짓 한 거야?

1200002206.english: It was the first time I saw Sterling get that angry, since he usually just gets annoyed no matter how stupid the captain does.
1200002206.korean: 대장이 아무리 바보짓해도 짜증만 내고 말던 스털링이 그렇게 화낸 건 처음 봤어.

1200002207.english: Even when the captain got tricked by those bad guys and brought back rotten food, he just clicked his tongue but didn't get angry.
1200002207.korean: 대장이 나쁜 놈들한테 속아서 다 썩은 식량 받아왔을 때에도 혀만 찼지 화는 안 냈잖아.

1200002208.english: … … So we taught those bad guys a lesson and got some proper food.
1200002208.korean: ……그래서 나쁜 놈들 혼쭐 내주고 제대로 된 식량 받아왔잖아.

1200002209.english: It feels different from back then, so go apologize quickly.
1200002209.korean: 그때랑은 다른 느낌이라고 빨리 가서 사과해.

1200002210.english: What are you going to do if Sterling gets angry and actually switches to Orca?
1200002210.korean: 스털링 화나서 정말로 오르카에 전향하면 어쩌려고?

1200002212.english: Haha—you said you went to the dragon's nest, right?

1200002220.english: Since the Haka belongs to the Captain anyway, he can do whatever he wants.
1200002220.korean: 어차피 하카는 대장 거니까 대장 마음대로 하면 되잖아요.

1200002221.english: I'm just a bio-android for the development, management, and operation of the Haka. I'm merely one of the Haka's components, so how could I possibly dare to tell the Captain what to do?
1200002221.korean: 저는 그냥 하카 개발, 관리, 운용용 바이오로이드잖아요. 저는 그냥 하카의 부속 중 하나일 뿐인데 어떻게 감히 대장 말에 이래라저래라 할 수 있겠어요?

1200002228.english: The commander has no reason to apologize, so there is no reason to accept the apology either.
1200002228.korean: 대장이 사과할 이유가 없으니 사과를 받아줄 이유도 없고요.

1200002229.english: I'm going to go hand over the Haka blueprints and all related materials to the Orca technical team.
1200002229.korean: 저는 오르카 기술진한테 하카 설계도랑 관련 자료 전부 넘겨주러 갈게요.

1200002230.english: Maybe they can make a new one for you later.
1200002230.korean: 어쩌면 나중에 새로 만들어줄 수도 있으니까요.

1200002231.english: Thank you! Thank you for your support!

1200002233.english: (Wouldn't it be better than making people anxious?)

1200002234.english: (But wasn't this also a safe zone? Why Metal Parasites? And that too with a puppet?)
1200002234.korean: (그런데 여기도 안전한 구역 아니었나요? 왜 철충이? 그것도 마리오네트랑?)

1200002235.english: (I don't know. Let's distribute the relief supplies and report back quickly.)

1200002237.english: To handle those Iron Blobs that can't even fight properly so easily...
1200002237.korean: 저희는 제대로 싸울 수 없는 철충을 그렇게 가볍게 처리하다니…

1200002240.english: Were there any relief supplies that were lacking?

1200002242.english: When I was there for Delta years, they took everything I had, leaving me barely alive.
1200002242.korean: 델타 년 있을 때는 있는 거 없는 거 다 털어가서 간신히 목숨만 유지하는 수준이었는 걸요.

1200002243.english: Now, on the contrary, we have so much left over that we can even stockpile it.
1200002243.korean: 지금은 오히려 이것저것 남아돌아서 비축을 할 수 있을 정도라니까요.

1200002244.english: Oh! If I say it like this, will you reduce the relief supplies or something?
1200002244.korean: 앗! 이렇게 말하면 구호물품 줄이거나 그러시나요?

1200002245.english: No. They give it out based on the amount needed per person, so it won't be reduced unless they cut that.
1200002245.korean: 아뇨. 1인당 필요량을 정해서 나눠주는 거라 이걸 줄이지 않는 한은 안 줄여요.

1200002246.english: But... did Ironbloods often appear here?

1200002247.english: I pass by the village occasionally, but this is the first time I've been this close.
1200002247.korean: 어쩌다 한 번씩 마을 근처를 지나기는 하는데… 이렇게 가까이 온 적은 처음이에요.

1200002248.english: I built a shelter just in case, but today was the first time I actually used it.
1200002248.korean: 혹시 몰라서 대피소를 만들어 뒀는데 실제로 쓴 건 오늘이 처음이네요.

1200002249.english: (Don't you think we should stay and protect it?)

1200002251.english: (But... I hope this isn't happening everyplace else too?)

1200002252.english: I came to investigate and didn't expect to end up fighting the Iron Blood.
1200002252.korean: 조사하러 왔다가 철충과 싸우게 될 줄 몰랐습니다.

1200002254.english: And there's no Elven Forest Maker either...

1200002255.english: Ugh... I didn't bring much ammo.

1200002256.english: Don't worry. Isn't there a weapon here too?

1200002257.english: Speaking of this weapon, it can be used in various places beside combat, you don't have to worry about running out of ammo, and it's more durable than a shotgun.
1200002257.korean: 이 무기로 말할 것 같으면 전투 외에도 다양한 곳에서 사용할 수 있으며, 잔탄을 걱정할 필요도 없고, 샷건 보다 더 내구성이 좋은 무기입니다.

1200002260.english: How can you catch a Metal Parasite with an ordinary ax? Even the saw Lumberjane uses is a modified one for combat...
1200002260.korean: 평범한 도끼로 어떻게 철충을 잡아? 럼버제인이 쓰는 톱도 전투용으로 개조한 건데…

1200002261.english: You don't swing an ax with your strength, you swing it with your heart.
1200002261.korean: 도끼는 힘으로 휘두르는 것이 아니라 마음으로 휘두르는 것입니다.

1200002262.english: Doesn't LRL also wield an ax?

1200002263.english: You're targeting their weakness, aren't you?

1200002264.english: As expected, the plants here are also undergoing mutations.
1200002264.korean: 역시나 여기 식물도 변형이 일어나고 있네요.

1200002265.english: They're ignoring me over there too...

1200002266.english: Even when I try to revitalize it with my nanobots, there's no response.
1200002266.korean: 제 나노봇으로 활기를 주려고 해도 아무런 반응이 없어요.

1200002269.english: That's strange. My nanobots aren't working either. Microorganisms are not properly decomposing the plants.
1200002269.korean: ……이상하군요. 제 나노봇도 작용하지 않는군요. 미생물이 식물을 제대로 분해하지 못하고 있습니다.

1200002270.english: It's not alive, nor is it dead...
1200002270.korean: 산 것도 아니고 죽은 것도 아닌 상태네요…

1200002272.english: I knew you'd come, you bastards!

1200002273.english: It's clear the Iron Worms are targeting the communication center.
1200002273.korean: 철충들이 통신센터를 노리고 있는 게 확실해졌네요.

1200002274.english: Did you hear what the speaker was saying when you guys were fighting?
1200002274.korean: 너희들 싸울 때 스피커가 무슨 말 하는지 들었어?

1200002275.english: Huh? No, I didn't hear it.

1200002276.english: When fighting, targeting the communicators, experts, or standard-bearers first is basic, isn't it?
1200002276.korean: 전투할 때 통신병이나 고수, 기수를 먼저 노리는 것은 기본이잖아.

1200002277.english: I shot at everything I saw.

1200002278.english: When I was flying earlier, I accidentally overheard someone saying something...
1200002278.korean: 아까 날아다닐 때 우연히 뭐라고 하는 걸 들었는데…

1200002279.english: They were talking about the new people...

1200002280.english: Then isn't that it? The sentence interpreted by the doctor.
1200002280.korean: 그러면 그거 아닌가요? 닥터가 해석한 문장.

1200002281.english: Citizens, gather at our nest. That's what they say.
1200002281.korean: 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지로 모이거라. 라고 하는거요.

1200002284.english: Fellow citizens, our nest is under threat. Punish the ignorant and foolish.
1200002284.korean: 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지가 위협받고 있다. 무지몽매한 자들을 처단하라.

1200002286.english: Considering Orca's current situation, that's not a very good thing to say...
1200002286.korean: 지금 오르카의 상황을 생각하면 느낌이 많이 안 좋은 말인데…

1200002288.english: The movements of the Iron Bug are unusual.

1200002289.english: Iron bugs were appearing in places that had been considered safe zones until now.
1200002289.korean: - 지금까지 안전지대라고 생각했던 곳에 철충이 출몰하고 있었다.

1200002290.english: - Units were organized and dispatched to rescue the kidnapped bioroids and to relocate the bioroids within the Iron Bug's sphere of influence.
1200002290.korean: - 납치된 바이오로이드들을 구하기 위한 부대와 철충의 세력권에 있는 바이오로이드들을 이주시키기 위한 부대를 편성하고 출발시켰다.

1200002291.english: The Orca members, who were carrying out recovery and investigation operations, engaged in battle with the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs).
1200002291.korean: - 복구작업과 조사작업을 진행하던 오르카 대원들이 철충과 전투를 벌였고.

1200002292.english: - The Orbital Watcher reported that the speaker made a strange shout.
1200002292.korean: - 오비탈 와쳐는 스피커가 이상한 외침을 했다고 보고를 올렸다.

1200002294.english: The subjects are Iron Bugs. The nest is the Tower of Iron, and the ignorant ones…
1200002294.korean: - 신민은 철충들. 둥지는 철의 탑, 무지몽매한 자들은…

1200002295.english: It was a phrase that didn't even require much thought.

1200002296.english: - At the very moment I was about to contact the commanders.
1200002296.korean: - 내가 지휘관들에게 연락을 하려고 한 그 순간에.

1200002297.english: - Reports of the commencement of engagement came in all at once.
1200002297.korean: - 교전 개시 보고가 한 번에 올라왔다.

1200002299.english: Iron Bugs are swarming toward the unit preparing to advance on the Iron Tower!
1200002299.korean: 철의 탑으로 진격하기 위해 준비 중이던 부대를 향해 철충들이 몰려들고 있소!

1200002300.english: We need air power, so we have reluctantly requested the sortie of the Sky Knights and Doom Bringers.
1200002300.korean: 공중 전력이 필요하여 부득이하게 스카이 나이츠와 둠 브링어의 출격을 요청했소.

1200002301.english: Since the Sky Knights and Doom Bringers, who will be the main force for the operation to destroy the Iron Tower, have been deployed to the front lines, it seems we need to reconsider the operation.
1200002301.korean: 철의 탑 파괴 작전에 주요 전력이 될 스카이 나이츠와 둠 브링어가 전선에 투입되었기에 작전을 재고해야 할 것 같소.

1200002302.english: I brought up the command interface and started commanding.
1200002302.korean: - 나는 지휘 인터페이스를 띄우고 지휘를 시작했다.

1200002303.english: Fellow citizens, our nest is under threat. Punish the ignorant and foolish.
1200002303.korean: 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지가 위협받고 있다. 무지몽매한 자들을 처단하라.

1200002304.english: First, focus on stopping the Iron Blobs! I'll help too!
1200002304.korean: 우선은 철충들을 막는데 집중해! 나도 도울게!

1200002305.english: - They barely managed to establish a defensive line and successfully stabilize the front.
1200002305.korean: - 간신히 방어 진형을 갖춰 전선을 고착화시키는데 성공했다.

1200002306.english: - But fierce fighting continued on the front lines.
1200002306.korean: - 하지만 전선에서는 치열한 전투가 이어지고 있었다.

1200002307.english: - The Orca crew, veterans of countless battles, were skillfully handling the Iron Blooded Beasts, but they had no idea how long this fight would last.
1200002307.korean: - 역전의 용사들인 오르카의 대원들은 능숙하게 철충들을 상대하고 있었지만 이 전투가 얼마나 길어질지 몰랐다.

1200002308.english: - The all-out war with the Iron Blooded that I've been avoiding until now.

1200002309.english: - When the Orca was our base, we could avoid battles as much as we wanted, but...
1200002309.korean: - 오르카 호가 거점일 때는 전투를 얼마든지 피할 수 있었지만…

1200002310.english: - Once we had established a base in Europe, it wasn't easy to withdraw.
1200002310.korean: - 유럽이라는 땅에 거점을 마련한 이상 쉽게 몸을 뺄 수는 없었다.

1200002311.english: - I knew we'd eventually have a full-scale war, but I didn't expect it to happen so quickly and suddenly.
1200002311.korean: - 언젠가 전면전을 벌일 거라 생각은 했지만 이렇게 빨리 그리고 갑작스럽게 벌어질 줄은 몰랐다.

1200002312.english: - Is it a problem that I tried to destroy the Iron Tower?
1200002312.korean: - 철의 탑을 파괴하려고 한 게 문제인가?

1200002313.english: - Did I provoke the Iron Blooded Beasts for nothing?

1200002314.english: - I steeled my resolve, which was weakening with doubt and regret.

1200002315.english: - You can doubt and regret later. Right now, we need to hold off the Iron Worms in front of us.
1200002315.korean: - 의심과 후회는 나중에 해도 된다. 지금은 눈 앞의 철충들을 막아내야 한다.

1200002316.english: Gremlin, the commander has ordered all personnel to stand by.
1200002316.korean: 그렘린, 사령관으로부터 전 대원 대기 명령이 떨어졌거든?

1200002317.english: I think we should postpone the Iron Tower destruction operation and prepare for battle for now, right?
1200002317.korean: 철의 탑 파괴 작전은 유예하고 일단 전투에 대비해야 할 거 같거든?

1200002318.english: Huh? I was just about to finally chew, tear, taste, and enjoy it, wasn't I?
1200002318.korean: 네? 이제 간신히 씹고 뜯고 맛보고 즐기려고 했는데요?

1200002319.english: That's something you can only do after you've managed to hold off the Iron Blood, right?
1200002319.korean: 그것도 일단 철충을 막아내고 난 다음에나 할 수 있는 일이거든?

1200002320.english: You need to grab your extension cord and go downstairs quickly, okay?

1200002321.english: Stay right here until we come back, Haktori.
1200002321.korean: 우리 다시 올 때까지 여기 가만히 있어, 핰돌아.

1200002324.english: You've grown attached in the meantime.

1200002325.english: Of course. How pretty is it? A giant airship made of romance.
1200002325.korean: 당연하죠. 얼마나 예뻐요? 로망으로 이루어진 거대 비행선.

1200002326.english: Well, seeing the internal structure gets me excited too, doesn't it?
1200002326.korean: 하긴 언니도 내부 구조를 보면 볼수록 흥분되거든?

1200002327.english: So, let's quickly drive out those Iron Blood bastards and shower Haktori with affection.
1200002327.korean: 그러니 철충 녀석들 얼른 몰아내고 핰돌이 예뻐해 주자고요.

1200002333.english: If I had known it would come to this, I should have learned from Sterling...
1200002333.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 스털링한테 배워놓을 걸…

1200002335.english: Do you have the brains to understand how it works? Don't touch it and break it; leave it to me.
1200002335.korean: 작동 원리 이해할 머리는 있고요? 괜히 손대서 박살내지 말고 저한테 맡기세요.

1200002336.english: Okay! That's what they would have said!

1200002337.english: How much have I done for you! I saved you from being trapped in the lab, fed you, gave you a place to sleep, and protected you! You ungrateful wretch!
1200002337.korean: 내가 해준 게 얼만데! 연구소에 갇혀 지내던 거 구해주고 먹여주고 재워주고 보호해줬는데! 배은망덕한 녀석 같으니!

1200002338.english: So, until now, you've been following along, controlling the Haka just as the boss wanted, haven't you?
1200002338.korean: 그래서 지금까지 대장이 원하는 대로 하카 조종하면서 따라다녔잖아요.

1200002340.english: What are you going to do?

1200002343.english: Cutting to the chase, I'll ask again.

1200002344.english: What are you going to do?

1200002346.english: Please listen without getting angry, okay? Got it?

1200002348.english: - I continued conducting, eating a gel-like convenience food from a tube that Constantia had given me.
1200002348.korean: - 나는 콘스탄챠에게 튜브에 담긴 젤 형태의 간편식을 받아먹으며 지휘를 이어갔다.

1200002349.english: - Constantia looked worried when I ate a quick meal, but knowing the current situation, she didn't react any further.
1200002349.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 내가 간편식으로 끼니를 때우자 걱정하는 표정을 지었지만 지금 상황이 어떤 지 알고 있기에 그 이상의 반응은 보이지 않았다.

1200002350.english: - With the team members fighting on the front lines, there's no way I'd have the luxury of leisurely enjoying a meal.
1200002350.korean: - 최전선에서 대원들이 싸우고 있는데 느긋하게 식사를 즐길 여유가 있을 리 만무하다.

1200002351.english: - Even my personal attendant, who usually prepares my meals, is on combat alert, so I won't even get my usual food.
1200002351.korean: - 내 식사를 담당하는 소완조차도 전투 대기 상태이니 평소 먹던 식사가 나오지도 않겠지만.

1200002352.english: We've reinforced the defensive line with defensive installations and trenches.

1200002353.english: Supply lines are unblocked, morale is high, and we will be able to continue the battle in top condition.
1200002353.korean: 물자 보급도 막힘이 없고 사기도 왕성하니 최상의 컨디션으로 전투를 지속할 수 있을 것이오.

1200002354.english: Even the members who were engaged in civilian activities and investigation work in the rear safe zone are now in combat with the Iron Blooded.
1200002354.korean: 후방의 안전지대에서 대민 활동, 조사 활동을 하던 대원들도 철충들과 교전 중이에요.

1200002355.english: I told them to prioritize safety over annihilation, but... they didn't prepare for combat, they equipped themselves and went out, and some of the team members can't communicate...
1200002355.korean: 섬멸보다는 안전을 최우선시 하라고 말해뒀지만… 전투를 상정하고 장비를 갖추고 나간 게 아니고 통신이 안 되는 대원들도 있어서…

1200002356.english: - Words to reassure Rapiata and Constancia. At the same time, it's a way to reassure me.
1200002356.korean: - 라비아타와 콘스탄챠를 안심시키기 위한 말. 동시에 나를 안심시키기 위한 말이다.

1200002357.english: - When I had emptied the tube about halfway, a communication request came in.
1200002357.korean: - 내가 튜브를 반쯤 비웠을 때 통신 요청이 들어왔다.

1200002365.english: They activated their cloaking field and stealth device to hide their appearance and then flew away just like that!
1200002365.korean: 은폐장이랑 스텔스 장치를 작동시켜 모습을 숨기고는 그대로 날아갔어요!

1200002366.english: Since it's a blimp, we had the mooring ropes tied down, but they came loose!
1200002366.korean: 비행선이다보니 계류삭을 묶어 뒀는데 그게 풀렸어요!

1200002367.english: Our crew members have all deboarded for now!

1200002368.english: If there are any, it would be Fafnir's gang...

1200002369.english: All of Fafnir's subordinates are staying here!

1200002370.english: - The fact that Fortune isn't using her usual way of speaking shows she's really flustered.
1200002370.korean: - 포츈의 평소의 말투를 안 쓰는 것을 보면 정말로 당황한 거 같다.

1200002372.english: Run away? Hey! Our captain wouldn't abandon us and run away!
1200002372.korean: 도망? 야! 우리 대장이 우리 버리고 도망갈 리 없거든!

1200002373.english: Cancel it! Take that back! Our boss might not be the sharpest tool in the shed, but he's definitely got loyalty down pat!
1200002373.korean: 취소해! 그 말 취소해! 우리 대장이 머리는 나빠도 의리 하나는 확실하다고!

1200002374.english: Our boss is greedy, so he probably took care of all of us and then ran away!
1200002374.korean: 우리 대장은 욕심 많아서 우리도 다 챙기고 도망쳤을 거라고!

1200002375.english: If our boss were that quick-witted, he'd have lived a much easier life!
1200002375.korean: 우리 대장이 그렇게 약삭빨랐으면 좀 더 편하게 살았겠지!

1200002376.english: If we're not here, who's going to do the haka chores?
1200002376.korean: 우리가 없으면 하카 잡일 누가 하겠어!

1200002377.english: And the captain can't move the haka by himself, absolutely not!
1200002377.korean: 그리고 대장 혼자서는 하카 절대로 못 움직이거든!

1200002380.english: The head of the institution, Sterling, can move on his own.
1200002380.korean: 기관장인 스털링 혼자면 움직일 수 있어요.

1200002381.english: To be precise... only Sterling can move.
1200002381.korean: 정확하게 말하자면… 스털링 밖에 못 움직여요.

1200002382.english: I saw you going to Hakata, but...

1200002383.english: Sterling got angry and I followed him to apologize...

1200002384.english: - Then there's a high probability that Fafnir and Sterling are on the Haka.
1200002384.korean: - 그러면 하카에는 파프니르와 스털링이 타고 있을 확률이 높다.

1200002386.english: I told you before that you should always prioritize life. It'll be okay.
1200002386.korean: 평소에도 생명을 제일 중요시 하라고 말해뒀잖아. 괜찮을 거야.

1200002389.english: Who was riding in the Hakka?

1200002390.english: How many people do you need to move the haka?

1200002394.english: You mean to build a giant airship with a payload of 7,500 tons that flies at high altitudes without being detected by radar or line of sight?
1200002394.korean: 적재량 7500톤에 레이더와 시야에 감지되지 않고, 고고도를 비행하는 거대 비행선을 만들라는 말씀이시죠?

1200002398.english: payload of 7,500 tons? For a ship traveling on the seas, that is several times more. An aircraft undetectable by radar or line of sight? Well... since I hear other research institutes are working on it, it should be possible if we can secure some cooperation. An airship flying at high altitudes? That would be possible if we installed additional devices besides buoyancy.
1200002398.korean: 적재량 7500톤? 바다를 다니는 배라면 그 몇 배 이상도 가능하죠. 레이더와 시야에 감지되지 않는 비행체? 뭐… 다른 연구소에서 연구중이라고 하니 적당히 협력을 구하면 가능하겠죠. 고고도를 비행하는 비행선? 부력 외에 추가 장치를 설치하면 가능하죠.

1200002399.english: But a giant airship with a payload of 7,500 tons that flies at high altitudes, undetectable by radar or line of sight?
1200002399.korean: 그런데 적재량 7500톤에 레이더와 시야에 감지되지 않고, 고고도를 비행하는 거대 비행선?

1200002403.english: You have to say something that makes sense for me to even consider accepting it.
1200002403.korean: 말이 되는 소리를 해야 받아주든가 말든가 하죠.

1200002404.english: Even if you plan the ultimate weapon like a child, if you lack the ability to realize it, it is just a fantasy, a fantasy.
1200002404.korean: 어린애처럼 최강의 병기를 계획해도 그것을 실현시킬 능력이 없으면 그냥 공상이에요, 공상.

1200002405.english: And for engineers like us, it is not a fantasy, but a delusion.
1200002405.korean: 그리고 우리같은 공학자들에게는 공상이 아니라 망상이고요.

1200002406.english: Can't you guess how much budget will be required?
1200002406.korean: 얼마나 많은 예산이 들어갈지 짐작이 안 가십니까?

1200002407.english: Didn't they secure the budget? They were pouring unlimited funds into it because they wanted to defeat Saman in this war no matter what.
1200002407.korean: 예산 타왔는데? 이번 전쟁에서 무슨 일이 있어도 삼안을 이기고 싶어서 예산을 무제한으로 퍼주던데?

1200002408.english: Then we have to do it.

1200002409.english: Let's start by making the blueprint.

1200002412.english: Just when you were cursing and asking if I was crazy…

1200002414.english: I am getting criticized because I didn't even mention that I secured the budget.
1200002414.korean: 예산 타왔다는 말부터 안 꺼냈으니 욕 먹는 겁니다.

1200002417.english: Why is the unit for tons an uppercase T instead of a lowercase T?
1200002417.korean: 이거 톤 단위가 왜 소문자 t가 아니라 대문자 T죠?

1200002418.english: … … Surely this isn't a short ton? 2000 pounds? About 900 kg?

1200002420.english: In this era where the development of Mars is becoming a reality, you mean they don't standardize units when designing aircraft?
1200002420.korean: 화성 개발이 가시화 된 이 시대에 항공기 설계 할 때 단위 통일을 안 한다고?

1200002421.english: Are you planning to add the airship we built to the list of incidents and accidents caused by unit system issues?
1200002421.korean: 단위계 문제로 일어난 사건사고 중에 우리가 만든 비행선도 추가할 생각이십니까?

1200002422.english: If an airship built with a massive budget crashes during its maiden flight, wouldn't we look quite pathetic?
1200002422.korean: 막대한 예산을 들여서 만든 비행선이 초도비행 중에 추락하면 우리 꼴이 참으로 멋지겠습니다?

1200002423.english: Things like that can happen in life.

1200002424.english: Don't you know that if something like this happens in life, we're dead?
1200002424.korean: 살다가 이런 일 일어나면 우리 뒈지는 거 모르십니까?

1200002425.english: Do you think Black River will let you go peacefully if you blow up the airship they built with a massive budget due to a basic mistake?
1200002425.korean: 블랙리버에서 막대한 예산을 들여서 만든 비행선을 기초적인 실수를 해서 날려먹으면 고이 보내줄 거라 생각하십니까?

1200002427.english: It's fine that you found it now, even if it's late.

1200002428.english: It is not enough that you have discovered it now; you also need to consider how your superiors might view it.
1200002428.korean: 지금이라도 발견했으면 된 것이 아니라 상부에서 어떤 식으로 생각할지도 생각하셔야죠.

1200002429.english: If the upper management considered short tonnes, the budget would have been reduced by that much, but if they considered metric tonnes, doesn't that mean they couldn't meet the upper management's demands?
1200002429.korean: 상부에서 쇼트 톤으로 생각했으면 그만큼 예산이 줄어들 거고, 미터법 톤으로 생각했으면 상부의 요구를 못 들어준 거 아닙니까.

1200002430.english: Standardized to the SI unit system. No objections are allowed.
1200002430.korean: SI단위계로 통일. 반론은 허용 안 합니다.

1200002431.english: Is this the bioroid that will assist us?

1200002432.english: Yeah. I requested support from higher ups, and they sent it.

1200002437.english: What use is a long name anyway?

1200002438.english: It's obvious you'll just shorten it later because it's a hassle.
1200002438.korean: 나중에는 귀찮아서 줄여서 부를 게 뻔히 보이는데.

1200002439.english: Alright, from today, your name is Sterling. Got it?
1200002439.korean: 자, 오늘부터 네 이름은 스털링이다. 알겠지?

1200002441.english: With a solid budget, let's build a vacuum airship!
1200002441.korean: 예산도 빵빵하겠다. 우리 비행선 진공 비행선으로 만들자!

1200002443.english: We've finished all the blueprints and even placed orders for materials... and you're suggesting we build a vacuum airship? The technology hasn't even been properly verified yet?
1200002443.korean: 지금 설계도 다 만들고 자재도 발주 들어갔는데… 비행선을 진공비행선으로 만들자고요? 기술 검증도 제대로 안 됐는데?

1200002444.english: Why… why? Are you going to swear again?

1200002446.english: That's a great idea! Since we're at it, let's just go all out!
1200002446.korean: 좋은 생각입니다! 이왕 하는 거 막 가죠!

1200002448.english: It doesn't matter to me anyway since you're the one getting chewed out by the higher-ups, Director.
1200002448.korean: 어차피 높은 사람한테 깨지는 건 소장님이니 저는 상관없죠.

1200002450.english: Do you want to see people go crazy? Didn't the higher-ups send hundreds of official memos telling us to be selective about the technicians we hire?
1200002450.korean: 사람 미치는 꼴 보고 싶습니까! 기술자들 가려서 받으라고 상부에서 수백 번이나 공문 보내지 않았습니까!

1200002451.english: What are you going to do if there is a spy!

1200002453.english: You have to act like an idiot once or twice for me to put up with it! You act like an idiot all the time, so how long do I have to put up with this!
1200002453.korean: 머저리 짓거리 한두 번 해야 받아주죠! 맨날 머저리 짓거리하는데 제가 언제까지 참아야합니까!

1200002454.english: Sterling, look at him. Talking rudely to his superior. He's only smart, but with such a bad personality, what use is he?
1200002454.korean: 스털링아. 쟤 봐라. 상관한테 막말하고. 저거 머리만 좋지 인성이 저렇게 나쁘니 어디 다가 쓰겠니?

1200002455.english: Sterling! Did I do something wrong, or did that lady do something wrong?
1200002455.korean: 스털링! 내가 잘못했냐, 저 아줌마가 잘못했냐?

1200002457.english: Look! Isn't it ridiculous that you can't help but laugh!

1200002458.english: Why~ It's nice to see you smiling.

1200002460.english: I really thought I was going to die from exhaustion.

1200002463.english: Damn it. I went through so much trouble and made you suffer to finally finish it, so shouldn't you see it!
1200002463.korean: 젠장. 그렇게 고생하고, 고생시킨 끝에 완성했는데 보셔야 할 거 아닙니까!

1200002464.english: Damn it… how long are you going to keep sleeping…

1200002465.english: Damn it… I barely managed to make it…

1200002472.english: If you meet a good boss, treat them well.

1200002473.english: Even though that woman had a strange personality... she was a good person, wasn't she?
1200002473.korean: 저 아줌마 성격은 이상해도… 좋은 사람이었잖냐.

1200002475.english: If you meet a good person, not a good boss.
1200002475.korean: 좋은 상사가 아니라 좋은 사람 만나면.

1200002477.english: The researcher must have been a good subordinate, too.

1200002478.english: What kind of good subordinate is one who badmouths their superior all the time?
1200002478.korean: 맨날 상관 욕하는 부하가 뭔 좋은 부하야.

1200002479.english: But you two got along well, didn't you?

1200002483.english: Seeing this take off... I'm scared because it feels like I might see it get shot down right away.
1200002483.korean: 이거 뜨는 거 보면… 곧장 격추되는 것도 보게 될 거 같아서 무섭다.

1200002484.english: Lately, when I dream, the haka either explodes before it can even rise... or even if it rises, it falls straight down.
1200002484.korean: 요즘 꿈을 꾸면 하카가 떠오르지도 못하고 터지거나… 떠올라도 곧장 추락하는 꿈을 꾼다.

1200002487.english: Still… later… if the chance arises…

1200002489.english: You've been through a lot too, you know. You miss it, don't you?

1200002493.english: (My raison d'être is the development, management, and operation of the Haka.)

1200002494.english: (What happens to me if I fail while trying to launch the Haka?)
1200002494.korean: (만약에 하카를 띄우려다가 실패하면 나는 어떻게 되는 걸까?)

1200002495.english: (And even if I launch it… what should I do next?)
1200002495.korean: (그리고 띄웠다고 하더라도… 그 다음에 나는 뭘 해야 하지?)

1200002496.english: (Hakado... and me... do I have to stay here in this research lab until I die, never seeing the light of day...)
1200002496.korean: (하카도… 나도… 이대로 이 연구소에서 빛을 보지 못하고 죽을 때까지 여기 있어야하는건가…)

1200002500.english: Warning sound? Is it an Iron Bug?

1200002503.english: wondered what kind of treasure could be in the Black River research lab.
1200002503.korean: 블랙리버의 연구소라고 해서 무슨 보물이 있을까 싶었는데.

1200002506.english: What is the most precious thing here?

1200002508.english: I am Fafnir! I am the one who will possess all the treasures of the world!
1200002508.korean: 나는 파프니르! 전 세계의 모든 보물을 소유할 자다!

1200002511.english: So bring the rarest thing from here!
1200002511.korean: 그러니까 여기에서 제일 진귀한 것을 가져와!

1200002512.english: First off… isn’t this the most precious place?

1200002515.english: It is the essence of Black River’s architectural engineering, materials engineering, mechanical engineering, aerospace engineering, electrical and electronic engineering, radio engineering, and optical engineering.
1200002515.korean: 블랙리버의 건축공학과 재료공학, 기계공학, 항공우주공학, 전기전자 공학, 전파공학, 광공학의 진수죠.

1200002516.english: The basic structure is a rigid airship with multiple airbags… Although it does not contain airframes, it is constructed with airbags, and then the outer shells of each bag are made of a material with high compressive stress, second moment-
1200002516.korean: 기본은 경식 비행선에 여러 기낭… 비록 기체는 안 들어가지만 기낭으로 구성한 다음에 각 기낭의 외피를 압축응력이 강한 재료로, 2차 모멘트-

1200002517.english: And the outermost shell incorporates cloaking fields and thermal and radio wave stealth technologies to prevent detection.
1200002517.korean: 그리고 가장 바깥 외피에는 은폐장과 열, 전파 스텔스 기술을 도입하여 탐지를 막아내죠.

1200002518.english: However, since atmospheric flow is unavoidable, it was designed on the premise of staying at high altitudes to avoid detection.
1200002518.korean: 하지만 대기의 흐름은 어쩔 수 없어서 탐지를 피하기 위해서 평소에는 고고도에서 머무르는 것을 전제로 설계되었어요.

1200002519.english: It rises to a certain altitude using buoyancy, but above that, it uses a separate floating device-
1200002519.korean: 일정고도까지는 부력으로 상승하지만 그 이상에서는 별도의 부유장치로-

1200002521.english: -Thanks to high compressive stress, minor damage can be repaired on its own-
1200002521.korean: -높은 압축응력 덕분에 작은 손상 정도는 스스로 수복-

1200002523.english: Ah, anyway! So it's an airship, right? The one floating around in the sky?
1200002523.korean: 아, 아무튼! 비행선이라는 거지? 하늘에 둥둥 떠다니는 거?

1200002524.english: But why isn't it showing up?

1200002525.english: Launching ceremony… no, because we didn’t do a vacuum ceremony.

1200002527.english: Well… it’s just a ceremony to launch it for the first time. For ships, it’s a launching ceremony. Since this is an airship, it’s a vacuum ceremony.
1200002527.korean: 뭐… 그냥 처음으로 띄우는 의식요. 배는 진수식. 이건 비행선이니 진공식.

1200002530.english: You said it's not floating because the vacuum wasn't done? Then can't you just do the vacuum?
1200002530.korean: 진공식을 안 해서 안 떠있다며? 그러면 진공식을 하면 되는 거 아냐?

1200002531.english: What is needed for a vacuum system?

1200002532.english: … … If humans had remained… we would have to go through various procedures, but…

1200002533.english: There isn't really... anything. Just do it.

1200002534.english: Really? Then let's start! Vacuum style!

1200002536.english: This might not come to mind. It's unverified, after all...
1200002536.korean: 이거 안 떠오를 수도 있어요. 검증되지 않은 거라…

1200002537.english: So you're saying it might come to mind?

1200002538.english: If you try, it might come to mind. If you don't, it won't come to mind like it does now.
1200002538.korean: 하면 떠오를 수도 있고. 안 하면 지금처럼 안 떠오른다.

1200002539.english: Yeah. It's more beneficial to do it, isn't it?

1200002542.english: Uh… by any chance… do you dislike it?

1200002543.english: No. F*ck, let's give it a try.

1200002545.english: Switched to power sources for combined fusion reactors 1 through 4.

1200002546.english: Retrieved mooring rope. Expanded air sac.

1200002547.english: Cloaking field activated. Thermal and electromagnetic stealth activated.
1200002547.korean: 은폐장 작동. 열, 전파 스텔스 작동.

1200002548.english: Air sac expansion complete. External sensor activated.

1200002549.english: Switching to floating device vector rudder…

1200002556.english: Yeah! You deserve to be my treasure!
1200002556.korean: 응! 내 보물이 될 자격이 있어!

1200002560.english: You should have seen it... but in the end, you couldn't...

1200002562.english: M-sorry? Actually, you didn't want to promote it?
1200002562.korean: 미, 미안? 사실 띄우고 싶지 않았던 거야?

1200002563.english: So, actually, you didn't want to give it to me?

1200002564.english: Uh, you don't have to force it.

1200002565.english: Right! Barter! Let's barter! What do you need?

1200002567.english: You said you would own all the treasures in the world, right?
1200002567.korean: 전 세계의 모든 보물을 소유할 거라고 하셨죠?

1200002570.english: Please take me with you too.

1200002571.english: Alright! Then you're my subordinate number one!

1200002572.english: Hehe. To think I've gained a moving treasure vault and even a subordinate... I really am lucky.
1200002572.korean: 후후. 움직이는 보물고에 부하까지 얻다니 나도 참 운이 좋다니까.

1200002573.english: Ah. By the way, what's your name?

1200002575.english: Right. Haka. What does Haka like?

1200002576.english: Huh? … … Ah. No. This airship's name is Hakago.
1200002576.korean: 네? ……아. 아뇨. 이 비행선 이름이 하카고.

1200002578.english: Right. Sterling. What does Sterling like?

1200002580.english: I am Gold! All treasures are good, but Gold is definitely the best!
1200002580.korean: 나는 황금! 보물은 다 좋지만 역시나 황금이 최고지!

1200002581.english: Am I a fool and a snob...

1200002583.english: I asked if he was a fool and a snob.

1200002584.english: Hey! Why are you so arrogant, subordinate! Show some respect for your commander!
1200002584.korean: 야! 부하가 왜 이리 건방져! 대장에 대한 존경심을 보여!

1200002585.english: It's because this is what I saw and learned.

1200002586.english: If you're dissatisfied, why don't you try moving the Haka without me?
1200002586.korean: 불만이면 저 없이 하카 움직여 보시던가요.

1200002588.english: I look forward to working with you, Captain.

1200002590.english: Huh? Why? Is something good happening?
1200002590.korean: 응? 왜? 기분 좋은 일이라도 있어?

1200002591.english: No. I just thought of something funny.

1200002594.english: What does this kid think of the boss?

1200002595.english: If you are dissatisfied, try moving this without me.
1200002595.korean: 불만이면 저 없이 이거 움직여 보세요.

1200002596.english: You're going to get annoyed if I touch you anyway.

1200002597.english: Of course. It's obvious it'll break if the boss touches it.
1200002597.korean: 당연하죠. 대장이 만지면 고장 날 게 뻔하니까.

1200002601.english: Since we have crossed the Kármán line... from here on, it is space.

1200002604.english: Is that really the whole reason?

1200002606.english: Because the higher you go, the more strain it puts on the haka.
1200002606.korean: 높이 올라가면 올라갈수록 하카에 무리가 가니까요.

1200002609.english: It’s not too late, even now.

1200002611.english: … … The Captain has done all sorts of stupid and crazy things… but this is the best of them all.
1200002611.korean: ……대장이 이런 저런 멍청하고 미친 짓을 많이 했지만… 이건 그 중에서도 최상이네요.

1200002613.english: But since the captain said so, I have to follow him to the end.

1200002614.english: I will keep the air sac inflated. It is necessary for directional control.
1200002614.korean: 기낭은 팽창한 상태 유지할게요. 방향조정에 필요하니까요.

1200002615.english: And it will also serve as a deception.

1200002616.english: Maximum output of a combined fusion reactor.

1200002618.english: The direction is… ground. Iron Tower.

1200002621.english: Hahaha! I am Merlin the Conqueror!

1200002622.english: Following Captain Muyong's orders, I conquered the Black River secret base!
1200002622.korean: 무용 대장님의 명에 따라 블랙리버의 비밀기지를 정복했다!

1200002623.english: Next is Pex's secret base! Next is the Iron Bug! And I will conquer the world! And I will make Arthur king.
1200002623.korean: 다음은 펙스의 비밀기지! 그 다음은 철충! 그리고 세계를 정복하겠다! 그리고 아서를 왕으로 만들겠다.

1200002625.english: It's boring without anyone to tackle me.
1200002625.korean: 옆에서 태클 걸어주는 사람이 없으니까 심심하네.

1200002626.english: Orange, that guy, was good at chatting away by himself even when no one was around.
1200002626.korean: 오렌지 걔는 사람 없어도 혼자 잘 떠들던데.

1200002627.english: I guess I still have a long way to go...

1200002628.english: No way! Poseidon can't admit defeat!
1200002628.korean: 아니지! 포세이돈이 패배를 인정할 수는 없는 노릇이지!

1200002629.english: Yeah! I can talk even more by myself! Yeah! Of course I can talk more!
1200002629.korean: 응! 나는 혼자서도 더 떠들 수 있어! 응! 더 떠들 수 있고말고!

1200002632.english: Phew. I need to hurry back, get praised by the dance captain, and ask Arthur to love me—
1200002632.korean: 어휴. 얼른 돌아가서 무용 대장님께 칭찬받고 아서한테 사랑해달라고 해야-

1200002633.english: Huh? A meteor? In broad daylight?

1200002634.english: Ah, no. This isn't the time for this. I need to make a wish!
1200002634.korean: 아, 아니. 이럴 때가 아니지. 소원 빌어야지!

1200002637.english: Captain Gamma, please let me come to Orca! Captain Gamma, please let me come to Orca! Captain Gamma, please let me come to Orca!
1200002637.korean: 감마 대장님 오르카에 오게 해주세요! 감마 대장님 오르카에 오게 해주세요! 감마 대장님 오르카에 오게 해주세요!

1200002639.english: Is it a bit slow for a meteor? It feels kind of artificial.
1200002639.korean: 유성 치고는 좀 느린가? 뭔가 인공적인 느낌인데?

1200002640.english: A missile? No, much bigger than that…

1200002641.english: The fuselage caught fire due to compression heat.

1200002642.english: Cloaking field, stealth device operation deactivated.

1200002643.english: It looks like the Iron Bugs have noticed us, too.

1200002644.english: However, with this speed and weight, the momentum is at a terrible level, so no matter how much you attack, you won't be able to change direction.
1200002644.korean: 하지만 이 속도, 이 무게면 운동량이 끔찍한 수준이니 아무리 공격해도 방향 못 바꿀 거예요.

1200002646.english: Take this, you Iron Bug bastards!

1200002647.english: Gold! It is the power of 24,000 tons!!!!!!!!!!!!

1200002648.english: It's too loud. Even if you shout like that, we're the only ones who will hear you.
1200002648.korean: 시끄러워요. 그렇게 외쳐도 들을 사람은 우리 밖에 없다고요.

1200002649.english: I just want to feel good, so why are you acting like this...

1200002650.english: What are you going to do about this atmosphere! Take responsibility!

1200002652.english: It is rapidly falling from the sky above the Iron Tower to the ground.
1200002652.korean: 철의 탑 상공에서 지상으로 빠르게 낙하하고 있습니다.

1200002653.english: I realized why Fafnir left his subordinates behind and disappeared with just Sterling.
1200002653.korean: - 나는 파프니르가 어째서 부하들을 두고 스털링과 둘이서 사라졌는지 깨달았다.

1200002654.english: I admired Fafnir's actions, but not for long.
1200002654.korean: - 나는 파프니르의 행동에 감탄했지만 오래는 아니었다.

1200002655.english: I spread the word to the combat units.

1200002656.english: 24,000 tons of gold crashed into the ground.

1200002658.english: Haka crashes into the Tower of Iron! Brace for impact!
1200002658.korean: 하카가 철의 탑에 충돌한다! 충격에 대비해!

1200002659.english: Nite Angel. What's the remaining bomb count?

1200002660.english: There's still a lot left. Enough to pour in for another ten days.
1200002660.korean: 아직 많이 남았어요. 앞으로 열흘은 더 쏟아부어도 될 정도로.

1200002661.english: However, the unit members and flight equipment are at their limits.

1200002662.english: Even after repeated resupply and bombing, there's no sign of the enemy numbers decreasing.
1200002662.korean: 재보급과 폭격을 반복하는 데도 적이 줄어들 기미가 안 보이네요.

1200002663.english: It's convenient because you can just unload without having to aim separately, but... I'm very tired.
1200002663.korean: 따로 조준할 필요없이 퍼부으면 되니 편하긴 한데. 많이 지치네요.

1200002664.english: Even if you're exhausted, even if you're about to collapse and die, keep repeating it.

1200002665.english: If we stop, it will put a strain on the ground forces.

1200002666.english: Oh my? Is the Doom Bringer already at its limit?

1200002667.english: You came to provoke me at a time like this?

1200002669.english: The bombing by the Doom Bringer seems to have weakened a bit, so I came to see what happened.
1200002669.korean: 둠 브링어의 폭격이 조금 기세가 약해지는 느낌이 있어서 무슨 일이 있었나 싶어서 찾아왔죠.

1200002671.english: You look pretty tired yourself, saying that.
1200002671.korean: 그렇게 말하는 너도 많이 지쳐 보이는데?

1200002672.english: He's discouraged because he's been away from his master for too long.
1200002672.korean: 주인님 곁을 너무 오래 떠나 있어서 낙담한 거예요.

1200002674.english: I want to see that idiot's face.

1200002676.english: Why are you suddenly trying to achieve enlightenment?
1200002676.korean: 너는 왜 갑자기 성불하려고 드는 건데?

1200002677.english: No. I'm just overwhelmed with emotion.

1200002678.english: How long are you going to keep doing that?

1200002679.english: At least for the time I suffered because of the captain.
1200002679.korean: 적어도 대장 때문에 고통 받았던 시간 만큼은요.

1200002680.english: They were cuter back then, you know.

1200002681.english: But I felt like I was suffocating.

1200002682.english: Do you have a chest that feels stifled?

1200002683.english: Even if you try to provoke our adjutant with your chest, it doesn't work anymore.
1200002683.korean: 우리 부관한테 가슴 가지고 도발해도 이제는 안 먹히더라.

1200002685.english: I'm grateful that the commander loves me just the way I am, but that's separate from other people making fun of me, isn't it?
1200002685.korean: 사령관님께서 제 모습을 그대로 사랑해주시는 건 감사하지만 남이 저 놀리는 건 별개인데요?

1200002687.english: I'll have the Sylphids graffiti every wall in the Battle Maid's quarters in the middle of the night.
1200002687.korean: 실피드한테 시켜서 밤중에 배틀 메이드 숙소 벽이란 벽에는 전부 낙서를 해버릴 테니까.

1200002688.english: With paint that won't come off no matter what.

1200002690.english: Then I'll have Hirume tell the Doom Bringers to reduce their snack supply.
1200002690.korean: 그러면 저는 히루메한테 시켜서 둠 브링어 간식 보급량을 줄이라고 말하도록 하죠.

1200002691.english: I'll tell Hirume that he missed it while doing the paperwork and have him fix it.
1200002691.korean: 히루메가 서류 작업하다가 누락시켰다고 말하고 히루메한테 수정 작업도 시키겠어요.

1200002692.english: The snack supply will be cut off for about a month, won't it?
1200002692.korean: 한 달 정도는 간식 보급이 끊길 걸요?

1200002693.english: Then I will tell Genie who was responsible for that situation.
1200002693.korean: 그러면 저는 지니야한테 그 사태의 원인이 누군지 말하겠습니다.

1200002694.english: And thru the Banshee, I'll also bring in Mr. Echidna and have them raid the Battle Maid's warehouse together.
1200002694.korean: 그리고 밴시를 통해 에키드나 씨도 끌어들여서 함께 배틀 메이드의 창고를 습격하게 만들겠습니다.

1200002698.english: Then get back to your mission!

1200002699.english: Let's think that each of our bombs saves the life of one of our comrades!
1200002699.korean: 우리 폭탄 한 발이 아군 한 명의 목숨을 살린다고 생각하고!

1200002700.english: If it's serious enough for me to step in, it must be really bad.

1200002701.english: It would have been nice if you were like this all the time, not just in situations like this.
1200002701.korean: 이럴 때 말고 평소에도 이러셨으면 좋았을 건데 말입니다.

1200002702.english: Isn't it because you guys usually do well?
1200002702.korean: 평소에 너희들이 잘해서 그런 거 아니겠냐.

1200002703.english: Panther, take half the kids and support the right steel line. It looks like the Iron Blooded will be swarming over there.
1200002703.korean: 팬서야, 애들 절반 데리고 우측 스틸라인 지원해라. 저쪽으로 철충이 몰려갈 거 같다.

1200002705.english: Since I'm working so hard today, don't nag me for a while, okay?
1200002705.korean: 나 오늘 이렇게 열심히 하니까 당분간은 잔소리 하지 마라?

1200002706.english: How can you just stand by and watch someone not do what they're supposed to be doing!
1200002706.korean: 원래 해야 하는 일 안 하는 걸 어떻게 보고만 있습니까!

1200002710.english: It reminds me of the time during the War of Destruction...

1200002711.english: Seeing that rainbow-colored smoke just makes me relax.
1200002711.korean: 저 무지개색 연기를 보면 긴장이 풀려버린다니까.

1200002712.english: We have confirmed that the Iron Worms that breached the third defensive line have been completely wiped out.
1200002712.korean: 3차 방어선을 침입한 철충이 전멸한 것을 확인했습니다.

1200002713.english: Regardless of the color, it's Azaz's special blend, so the firepower is guaranteed.
1200002713.korean: 색은 어찌되었건 간에 아자즈 특제이니 화력은 확실합니다.

1200002715.english: Fortunately, the angle of the fall wasn't too bad, so I wasn't seriously injured.
1200002715.korean: 다행히 추락 각도가 나쁘지 않아서 크게 다치지는 않았습니다.

1200002716.english: However, they say that further fighting today is no longer possible.
1200002716.korean: 다만 오늘 전투는 더 이상 불가능하다고 합니다.

1200002717.english: I thot the Iron Tower collapsing would make the Iron Worms retreat too, but I was mistaken.
1200002717.korean: 철의 탑이 무너지면 철충도 물러날 거라 생각했는데, 오산이네.

1200002718.english: We need to clearly understand the behavior patterns of the Iron Blooded.
1200002718.korean: 철충이 무슨 행동양식을 가지는지 확실하게 파악할 필요가 있겠어.

1200002720.english: Let's just try to survive this battle.

1200002722.english: It's okay, it's okay. If I just rest a little...

1200002724.english: No, the doctor must be fighting right now too...
1200002724.korean: 아니, 닥터도 지금 싸우고 있을 테니까…

1200002728.english: My family is fighting. I can't keep resting by myself.
1200002728.korean: 가족들이 싸우고 있어. 나 혼자 계속 쉬고 있을 수 없어.

1200002729.english: How could I have gotten a real family like this...

1200002732.english: Instead, take it a little easier until you feel better.
1200002732.korean: 대신 괜찮아질 때까지 조금 덜 무리해.

1200002733.english: In the meantime, the other family members will try a little harder.
1200002733.korean: 그 동안 다른 가족들이 조금 더 힘낼 테니까.

1200002734.english: - Even tho the Iron Tower had fallen, the Iron Worms didn't let up their offensive.
1200002734.korean: - 철의 탑이 무너졌지만 철충들은 공세를 늦추지 않았다.

1200002735.english: - Instead, it felt like the Iron Tower had collapsed and become even more intense.
1200002735.korean: - 오히려 철의 탑이 무너지고 더 거세진 느낌도 있었다.

1200002736.english: - As if they were seeking revenge.

1200002737.english: - I'm using all my abilities and the power of the Orca crew to hold them back, but at this rate, we'll be overwhelmed.
1200002737.korean: - 내가 가진 능력과 오르카 대원들의 힘을 총 동원하여 막아내고 있지만 이대로라면 중과부적으로 밀릴 것이다.

1200002738.english: - When I was grappling with how to break thru this situation without loosening the reins of command.
1200002738.korean: - 지휘의 고삐를 늦추지 않고 이 방법을 타개할 방법을 고민하고 있을 때.

1200002740.english: A new Metal Parasite has appeared behind the Metal Parasites.

1200002742.english: - I could taste blood, but I didn't feel any pain.

1200002743.english: - Now we need to develop a strategy to retreat, not just defend.
1200002743.korean: - 이제는 막아내는 것이 아니라 후퇴할 전략을 세워야 한다.

1200002745.english: - A new Ironclad has approached the rear of the Ironclads we are facing.
1200002745.korean: - 우리가 상대하고 있는 철충의 후방에 새로운 철충이 다가갔다.

1200002747.english: - The two Ironblood groups started fighting.

1200002748.english: - The Iron Worms that were attacking our base turned and began attacking the newly appeared Iron Worms.
1200002748.korean: - 우리 진지를 향해 공격을 가하던 철충들은 몸을 돌려 새로 나타난 철충들을 공격하기 시작했다.

1200002749.english: - I recalled the scenes I had witnessed when I used to rescue refugees in the past.
1200002749.korean: - 나는 과거 난민들을 구출하던 때에 봤던 광경을 떠올렸다.

1200002750.english: - The civil war of the Iron Beasts.

1200002751.english: - And that scene was being replicated in Europe as well.
1200002751.korean: - 그리고 그 광경이 유럽에서도 재현되고 있었다.

1200002752.english: - Orca is the anvil, and the new Iron Blooded Ones are the hammers.
1200002752.korean: - 오르카가 모루가 되고 새로운 철충들이 망치가 된 상황.

1200002753.english: I was worried that hammer would break even the Orca anvil.
1200002753.korean: - 저 망치가 오르카라는 모루까지 깨트리지 않을까 걱정됐다.

1200002754.english: - He nervously gave commands and watched the movements of the new Iron Blooded Ones.
1200002754.korean: - 초조하게 지휘를 하며 새로운 철충들의 움직임을 살폈다.

1200002755.english: - The Metal Parasites that poured out of the Iron Tower turned around to face the new enemy when they were attacked from behind.
1200002755.korean: - 철의 탑에서 몰려나온 철충들은 후방에서 공격당하자 몸을 돌려 새로운 적을 상대했다.

1200002756.english: - Naturally, the offensive against Orca also weakened.

1200002757.english: - The situation has eased a bit, but the urgency hasn't disappeared.
1200002757.korean: - 상황은 조금 여유로워졌지만 긴박함은 사라지지 않았다.

1200002759.english: - The Metal Parasites that had poured out of the Iron Tower, perhaps judging the new Metal Parasites to be a greater threat, turned all their remaining forces toward the new Metal Parasites.
1200002759.korean: - 철의 탑에서 몰려나온 철충들은 새로운 철충들을 더 큰 위협으로 판단했는지 남은 병력을 전부 새로운 철충들을 향해 돌렸다.

1200002761.english: - When we were evacuating the refugees, we had to retreat and couldn't see properly, but now the Iron Blood's civil war was unfolding right before our eyes.
1200002761.korean: - 난민들을 대피시키던 때에는 후퇴하느라 제대로 보지 못했던 철충의 내전이 눈앞에서 펼쳐졌다.

1200002764.english: - The battle between the Iron Beasts is over.

1200002765.english: - The winner is the newly appeared Iron-Blooded Beast.

1200002766.english: - We looked at the new Ironclad units, tense.

1200002768.english: - The new Ironbloods retreated without attacking Orca.
1200002768.korean: - 새로운 철충들은 오르카를 공격하지 않고 물러났다.

1200002769.english: - I let out an inexplicable laugh.
1200002769.korean: - 나는 알 수 없는 웃음을 흘렸다.

1200002770.english: - It wasn't a laugh born from joy or amusement.

1200002772.english: - But we can't just keep laughing.
1200002772.korean: - 하지만 마냥 웃고만 있을 수는 없다.

1200002773.english: - I had to clean up after the battle.

1200002776.english: Evacuate the wounded and redistribute the ammunition!

1200002777.english: Don't attack before the attack starts again! Prepare for battle!
1200002777.korean: 다시 공격이 시작되기 전에 공격하지마! 태세를 정비해!

1200002779.english: The invisible force field within the Iron Tower's influence has disappeared!
1200002779.korean: 철의 탑 영향권의 불가시 역장이 사라졌다고 하오!

1200002780.english: I've confirmed that a crater has formed where the Iron Tower used to stand!
1200002780.korean: 철의 탑이 있던 자리에 크레이터가 생긴 것을 확인했소!

1200002781.english: We've achieved the objective of this operation, so now all we have to do is hold off the remaining Iron Blooded Ones, and victory will be ours!
1200002781.korean: 이번 작전의 목적은 달성했으니 이제 남은 철충을 막아내기만 하면 우리의 승리요!

1200002782.english: Orca forces, all units! Annihilate the remaining Iron Blooded Ones!

1200002783.english: - After the commander's meeting, which also served as a battle report, I returned to my room.
1200002783.korean: - 전투 보고를 겸한 지휘관 회의가 끝나고 나는 내 방으로 돌아왔다.

1200002784.english: - Everything went smoothly, but it was just luck.
1200002784.korean: - 모든 것이 순조롭게 풀렸지만 운이 좋았을 뿐이다.

1200002786.english: - Luckily, just as we discovered the Iron Tower, Fafnir appeared riding the Dragon's Nest.
1200002786.korean: - 운이 좋게 철의 탑을 발견할 즘에 파프니르가 용의 둥지를 타고 나타났고.

1200002787.english: - Luckily, Fafnir collided with the Iron Tower at the dragon's nest, causing it to collapse.
1200002787.korean: - 운이 좋게 파프니르가 용의 둥지로 철의 탑과 충돌하여 철의 탑을 무너트리고.

1200002788.english: - Luckily, new Ironbloods appeared and wiped out the Ironbloods attacking Orca.
1200002788.korean: - 운이 좋게 새로운 철충이 나타나 오르카를 공격하는 철충을 전멸시키고.

1200002789.english: - Luckily... the new Ironbloods didn't attack Orca and retreated.
1200002789.korean: - 운이 좋게… 새로운 철충들은 오르카를 공격하지 않고 물러났다.

1200002790.english: - Luckily... I've managed to hold on until now.

1200002791.english: - If I had been even a little unlucky...

1200002792.english: - They would have been wiped out or lost many of their members.
1200002792.korean: - 전멸 혹은 많은 대원들을 잃었을 것이다.

1200002793.english: - The results were good, but the judgment was wrong.

1200002796.english: Everyone agreed. It wasn't a decision the commander made alone.
1200002796.korean: 모두가 동의했어요. 사령관님 혼자 한 판단이 아니에요.

1200002800.english: Our goal has been achieved, and the moment of crisis has passed.
1200002800.korean: 우리의 목표는 달성했고 위기의 순간은 지나갔어요.

1200002801.english: Even if you reflect, don't regret or blame yourself. Nothing irreversible has happened, right?
1200002801.korean: 반성은 하더라도 후회하고 자책은 하지 마세요. 돌이킬 수 없는 일은 일어나지 않았잖아요.

1200002802.english: After the Iron Insect invasion, it was almost the first time we succeeded in destroying one of their strongholds, wasn't it?
1200002802.korean: 철충의 침공이 있고 난 후 거의 처음으로 철충의 본거지 중 하나를 파괴하는 데에 성공했잖아요.

1200002803.english: It's something even ancient humans couldn't do when they were alive.
1200002803.korean: 옛 인류가 살아 있을 때에도 하지 못했던 일이에요.

1200002804.english: It's something I never even imagined when I was leading the resistance.
1200002804.korean: 제가 저항군을 꾸려 나갈 때에는 생각도 못했던 일이고요.

1200002806.english: - Labiata's words melted the knot in my chest.
1200002806.korean: - 라비아타의 말에 가슴 속의 응어리가 녹아났다.

1200002807.english: - As Labiata said, this wasn't the time for regret and self-blame.
1200002807.korean: - 라비아타의 말 대로 후회와 자책만 할 시간은 아니었다.

1200002808.english: - We have won, and the threat to Orca is gone.
1200002808.korean: - 우리는 승리했고 오르카를 위협하던 존재 하나가 사라졌다.

1200002809.english: - It's not the best, but it's the best possible outcome.

1200002810.english: - Let's be happy for now. And let's analyze it so we don't repeat this mistake again.
1200002810.korean: - 일단은 기뻐하자. 그리고 다시는 이런 실수를 반복하지 않게 분석하자.

1200002814.english: - Although they weren't part of Orca... my heart ached at the sacrifice of the two who saved Orca.
1200002814.korean: - 비록 오르카 소속은 아니었지만… 오르카를 구한 둘의 희생에 가슴이 아려왔다.

1200002815.english: - While we were discussing what kind of memorial service to hold for their sacrifice.
1200002815.korean: - 둘의 희생에 대해 어떤 추모식을 가질 지 논의하고 있을 때.

1200002817.english: But why is the atmosphere like this? I think we need a change of pace.
1200002817.korean: 그런데 분위기가 왜 이래? 분위기 환기가 필요한 거 같은데?

1200002818.english: How about Poseidon's special atmosphere-refreshing grenade?
1200002818.korean: 포세이돈 특제 분위기 환기용 수류탄은 어때?

1200002819.english: But why are you so down in the dumps? Shall I peel it for you?
1200002819.korean: 그런데 왜 그리 죽상이야? 한 꺼풀 벗어줄까?

1200002820.english: Oh, and I found this on the way.

1200002821.english: - Merlin said it casually and opened the door.
1200002821.korean: - 멀린은 대수롭지 않게 말하고 문을 열었다.

1200002824.english: Heh heh. Do you think this Fafnir will die easily?
1200002824.korean: 흐흥. 이 파프니르가 쉽게 죽을 거 같아?

1200002825.english: Isn't it a cliché that the comedic relief character usually doesn't die?
1200002825.korean: 원래 개그캐는 안 죽는 게 클리셰잖아요.

1200002826.english: Sterling, is he the comic relief?

1200002827.english: It's even more infuriating because they're asking without realizing it...
1200002827.korean: 자각 없이 묻는 거라 더 열받네…

1200002830.english: I know I talked a lot of trash about the leader and was sarcastic...
1200002830.korean: 제가 대장 욕 많이 하고 비꼬고 그랬지만…

1200002832.english: I've always been grateful to the captain.

1200002833.english: If it weren't for the professor, I'd still be in that lab.
1200002833.korean: 대장이 없었으면 저는 그 연구실에서 아직까지 있었을 테니까요.

1200002835.english: Because the captain spared my life...

1200002836.english: So I followed this crazy plan.

1200002837.english: Even if I die with the captain...

1200002838.english: Huh? I don't intend to die, do I?

1200002839.english: ...You think you can survive a blimp carrying 24,000 tons of gold crashing into the ground?
1200002839.korean: ……황금 2만 4천 톤이 실린 비행선이 지상과 충돌하는데 살아남을 생각을 하세요?

1200002840.english: Did you really think they wouldn't die?

1200002843.english: This person is making people go crazy until the very end.
1200002843.korean: 이 사람 마지막까지 사람 돌게 만드네.

1200002844.english: You're going to jump from this altitude, at this speed, at this temperature, at this oxygen density, at this air pressure?
1200002844.korean: 이 고도, 이 속도, 이 온도, 이 산소 밀도, 이 기압에서 뛰어내린다고요?

1200002845.english: Couldn't I just jump off at the right moment?
1200002845.korean: 타이밍 잘 맞춰서 뛰어내리면 되지 않을까?

1200002846.english: I've even jumped without a parachute before. And now, unlike in the old days, there are parachutes, right?
1200002846.korean: 나는 옛날에 낙하산 없이 강하 해본 적도 있다고. 그리고 지금은 옛날과 다르게 낙하산 있잖아.

1200002847.english: Jumping out of a plane flying normally horizontally is the same as jumping out of an airship descending rapidly toward the ground!?
1200002847.korean: 평범하게 수평 비행하는 비행기에서 뛰어내리는 거랑 지상으로 고속으로 하강하는 비행선에서 뛰어내리는 게 같아요!?

1200002848.english: If you do it, you might live, but if you don't, you're definitely going to die.
1200002848.korean: 하면 살 수도 있고, 안 하면 무조건 죽잖아.

1200002849.english: It's beneficial to do it, isn't it?

1200002850.english: If you do it, you'll die painfully, but if you don't, you might die peacefully all at once.
1200002850.korean: 하면 괴롭게 죽고, 안 하면 한 번에 편하게 죽을 수도 있는데요?

1200002851.english: You won't know until you try.

1200002853.english: Let go! I'm going to die!

1200002854.english: You won't die. You won't die.

1200002855.english: I'm a brainiac, so I'm different from the captain, who's all brawn!

1200002859.english: That dumb bitch is going to catch a bio-droid!

1200002861.english: (Don't grab my arms and legs!) You can't swim, can you!)
1200002861.korean: (제 팔다리 잡지 마요! 헤엄 못 치잖아요!)

1200002863.english: (This is insane... I thot the most dangerous moment had passed, but I never expected to drown like this...)
1200002863.korean: (돌겠네… 제일 위험한 순간 지났는데 이런 식으로 물에 빠져 죽을 줄은 몰랐는데…)

1200002864.english: (Let go!) I'll drag the boss up there somehow!)

1200002865.english: (So, you idiot, don't hug me so tight I can't swim!)
1200002865.korean: (그러니까 헤엄 못 치게 끌어안지 말라고 빡대가리야!)

1200002869.english: Go, cough! Cough! Thank you! Cough! Cough!
1200002869.korean: 가, 콜록! 콜록! 감사합니다! 콜록! 콜록!

1200002870.english: Yohoho! I am the adorable pirate Merlin! Since I have caught you, you are now my possession.
1200002870.korean: 요호호! 나는 귀염둥이 대해적 멀린이다! 너희는 내가 낚았으니 이제 너희는 내 소유다.

1200002872.english: I barely survived, and now I've been captured by pirates?
1200002872.korean: 간신히 살아났더니 이제는 해적한테 잡힌 거야?

1200002873.english: Okay! Now, after we throw you into hot water, we'll find out what happened thru torture, and we'll put you in a prison of a soft bed until we offer you to our boss.
1200002873.korean: 그래! 이제 너희를 뜨거운 물에 집어넣은 후, 무슨 일이 있었는지 식고문을 해서 알아내고, 우리 두목에게 너희를 바칠 때까지 푹신한 침대라는 감옥에 집어넣겠다.

1200002875.english: ...He's speaking strangely, but it sounds like he's saying he'll wash us, feed us, and let us sleep?
1200002875.korean: ……말은 이상하게 하는데 우리 씻겨주고 먹여주고 재워주겠다는 말인 거 같은데요?

1200002876.english: It's a wicked way to make you not realize I'm doing evil things until you die.
1200002876.korean: 너희가 죽을 때까지 내가 사악한 짓을 하고 있다는 것을 알아차리지 못하는 극악한 방법이지.

1200002877.english: Wait here for a moment, I'll get a towel.

1200002882.english: I told you I could buy it.

1200002884.english: Being alive is truly wonderful. Isn't that right?
1200002884.korean: 살아있다는 것은 참 멋진 거야. 안 그래?

1200002887.english: Me too... I gave up all my treasures...

1200002888.english: Strictly speaking, the dragon's nest was mine too?
1200002888.korean: 엄밀하게 말하면 용의 둥지도 내 거였다?

1200002890.english: Shut up, will you? Because I'm pissed off.

1200002893.english: I explained everything, but now that someone's butting in, I'm getting angry again.
1200002893.korean: 설명은 내가 다 했는데 옆에서 가로채니 또 열받네.

1200002895.english: ...As a result, it's come to this, Commander.

1200002897.english: - It was a laugh of joy, different from the laugh after the battle with the Iron Plague.
1200002897.korean: - 철충과의 전투 직후의 웃음과는 다른 기쁨의 웃음이었다.

1200002899.english: Eek! Arthur! In front of others...
1200002899.korean: 꺅! 아서! 남들 눈이 있는 곳에서…

1200002901.english: - Next, I stopped myself from trying to hug Fafnir and Sterling.
1200002901.korean: - 다음으로 나는 파프니르와 스털링을 안으려다가 멈췄다.

1200002902.english: - Well, for starters, those two weren't affiliated with Orca.
1200002902.korean: - 일단은 두 사람은 오르카 소속은 아니었으니까.

1200002905.english: Of course you should be grateful! I gave up all the treasures I had!
1200002905.korean: 당연히 고마워 해야지! 내가 가진 모든 보물 포기했는데!

1200002906.english: I blew up the Iron Tower or whatever it was, sacrificing all my treasures, so you should give me something worthy in return, right?
1200002906.korean: 내 보물 모두 바쳐서 철의 탑인가 뭔가 날려버렸으니까 너도 그에 걸맞는 걸 줘야지?

1200002907.english: Don't make such a big deal out of it. Because I'm annoying.

1200002908.english: But... I should get something in return.

1200002909.english: Commander, may I make a request?
1200002909.korean: 사령관님, 한 가지 요청 드려도 될까요?

1200002910.english: Could all the crew members of the Haka, including myself, join the Orca?
1200002910.korean: 저를 포함한 하카의 승조원들 전부 오르카에 합류해도 될까요?

1200002911.english: I somehow lost my place to stay.

1200002914.english: Hey, watch your mouth! Oh, no. It's gotten long, tho. You've gotten a bit cocky, haven't you?
1200002914.korean: 마, 말이 짧다? 아, 아니. 길어지긴 했는데. 뭔가 건방져졌다?

1200002915.english: Now my boss isn't Fafnir, but the commander.
1200002915.korean: 이제 내 상사는 파프니르가 아니라 사령관님이니까.

1200002917.english: So, what are you going to do?

1200002920.english: - Fafnir and his subordinates have joined Orca.

1200002921.english: - It wasn't the best result, but the greatest result.

1200002924.english: But if I want it, everyone will follow.

1200002925.english: But... we've lost our greatest heroes.

1200002927.english: Where do I even begin explaining...?

1200002936.english: - This incident has reminded us once again how terrifying the Iron Blooded are as enemies.
1200002936.korean: - 이번 사태로 우리는 철충이 얼마나 무서운 적인지 다시 깨달았다.

1200002937.english: Orca has become much stronger compared to the past.

1200002938.english: In the past, they wouldn't have even been able to resist properly, let alone defend, and would have been completely wiped out.
1200002938.korean: 과거라면 수비는 커녕 제대로 저항도 못하고 전멸했을 거예요.

1200002939.english: In the past... there was never a time when Bioroids were this strong, not even before the Destruction War, let alone after it.
1200002939.korean: 과거에는… 멸망 전쟁 이후가 아니라 이전에도 바이오로이드가 이렇게 강했던 적은 없어요.

1200002940.english: - And the things to investigate have increased.

1200002941.english: - Whether this anomaly only occurred near the Iron Tower we destroyed, what exactly the Iron Tower's role was, how the Iron Worm forces split, and what the differences are.
1200002941.korean: - 이번 이상현상이 우리가 파괴한 철의 탑 근처에서만 일어난 일인지, 철의 탑이 정확하게 어떤 역할을 하는지, 철충의 세력이 어떻게 갈라졌고, 어떤 차이가 있는지.

1200002942.english: - And... why the newly appeared Iron Blooded Beasts didn't attack us and just retreated.
1200002942.korean: - 그리고… 새롭게 나타난 철충이 왜 우리는 공격하지 않고 그냥 물러났는지.

1200002943.english: - The questions about the Iron Plague only continued to grow.
1200002943.korean: - 철충에 대한 의문은 계속 늘어나기만 했다.

1200002944.english: - And on top of that, my questions increased.

1200002946.english: - The gremlin was carrying a lot of things and going somewhere.
1200002946.korean: - 그렘린은 뭔가 잔뜩 들고 어디론가 가고 있었다.

1200002947.english: This is a funeral, not a festival, isn't it?

1200002950.english: - I didn't say it was a machine anyway.
1200002950.korean: - 어차피 기계 아니냐는 말은 하지 않았다.

1200002951.english: - Because what people value is different for everyone.
1200002951.korean: - 사람마다 소중하게 여기는 것은 다를 테니까.

1200002952.english: Will the commander be attending as well?

1200002954.english: - I went to Haka's funeral with the gremlins.
1200002954.korean: - 나는 그렘린과 함께 하카의 장례식장에 갔다.

1200002955.english: - At Haka's funeral, Orca's technical staff and Haka's crew members had gathered.
1200002955.korean: - 하카의 장례식장에는 오르카의 기술진들과 하카의 승조원들이 모여 있었다.

1200002957.english: Thank you for attending Haka's funeral.

1200002958.english: The Haka was originally developed by the Black River Company during the Second Coalition War.
1200002958.korean: 하카는 과거 2차 연합전쟁 때 블랙리버 사에서 개발이 시작되었습니다.

1200002959.english: The essence of Black River's architectural engineering, materials engineering, mechanical engineering, aerospace engineering, electrical and electronics engineering, radio engineering, and optical engineering...
1200002959.korean: 블랙리버의 건축공학과 재료공학, 기계공학, 항공우주공학, 전기전자 공학, 전파공학, 광공학의 진수로…

1200002960.english: The outer shell incorporates cloaking and thermal, radar, and radio stealth technology to prevent detection.
1200002960.korean: 바깥 외피에는 은폐장과 열, 전파 스텔스 기술을 도입하여 탐지를 막아내죠.

1200002961.english: However, because atmospheric currents are unavoidable, it was designed to stay at high altitudes most of the time to avoid detection.
1200002961.korean: 하지만 대기의 흐름은 어쩔 수 없어서 탐지를 피하기 위해서 평소에는 고고도에서 머무르는 것을 전제로 설계되었어요.

1200002962.english: It rises by buoyancy up to a certain altitude, but beyond that, with a separate floating device...
1200002962.korean: 일정고도까지는 부력으로 상승하지만 그 이상에서는 별도의 부유장치로-

1200002963.english: -Power is provided by 8 hybrid fusion reactors-

1200002964.english: -Due to high compressive stress, minor damage can self-repair-
1200002964.korean: -높은 압축응력 덕분에 작은 손상 정도는 스스로 수복-

1200002965.english: - Sterling began to list the history of the haka.
1200002965.korean: - 스털링은 하카의 역사에 대해서 나열하기 시작했다.

1200002966.english: - The funeral attendees listened to her words in a solemn atmosphere.
1200002966.korean: - 장례식 참석자들은 숙연한 분위기 속에서 그녀의 말을 들었다.

1200002967.english: And finally, Haka threw himself down, collapsing the Tower of Iron and saving everyone from danger.
1200002967.korean: 그리고 마침내 하카는 자신의 몸을 던져 철의 탑을 무너트리고 모두를 위기에서 구했습니다.

1200002968.english: Let us pause for a moment of silence to honor her brave final moments.
1200002968.korean: 용감했던 그녀의 최후를 기리며 잠시 묵념하겠습니다.

1200002969.english: (Huh? Was Haka a girl? Not a hater, but a fan?)

1200002970.english: (Ships are often referred to as feminine, you know?) It seems the airship, the Hakka, followed suit, right?)
1200002970.korean: (배는 여성형으로 부를 때가 많거든? 비행선인 하카도 그걸 따른 거 같거든?)

1200002971.english: (But you're not supposed to make any noise during a moment of silence, are you!?)
1200002971.korean: (그런데 묵념할 때 잡소리는 하면 안 되거든!?)

1200002972.english: - The moment of silence ended in a solemn atmosphere, with occasional sniffles being heard.
1200002972.korean: - 가끔씩 훌쩍거리는 소리가 들리는 숙연한 분위기 속에서 묵념이 끝났다.

1200002973.english: - I spoke what I was thinking during the moment of silence.
1200002973.korean: - 나는 묵념을 하던 동안에 생각했던 것을 입밖으로 꺼냈다.

1200002974.english: Yes! It's been pushed down the priority list for now, but I plan to study it slowly later.
1200002974.korean: 응! 지금 다른 것들에 우선순위가 밀렸지만 나중에 천천히 연구해볼 생각이거든.

1200002975.english: And while maintaining the Haka, I also scanned and reverse-engineered it.
1200002975.korean: 그리고 하카 정비하는 동안에 스캔하고 역설계해본 것도 있어요.

1200002977.english: But the list cut can't make it...

1200002979.english: That's a great decision! Then, after this funeral is over, I'll have to get started on developing and building the Haka Mk2 for a new project!
1200002979.korean: 훌륭한 판단이거든! 그러면 이 장례식 끝나고 새로운 일감으로 하카 Mk2 개발 및 제작 올려야겠거든!

1200002981.english: I've always loved you, but today even more, hehe.

1200002985.english: Thank you for not letting it be in vain...

1200002987.english: Because an object weighing over 24,000 tons accelerated and descended from 100km above the surface.

1200002988.english: If we know the exact speed just before the collision, we can also calculate the strength of the Iron Tower...
1200002988.korean: 충돌하기 직전의 정확한 속도를 알면 철의 탑의 강도가 얼만지도 계산할 수 있는데…

1200002989.english: I've only ever run these in a simulator, this is the first time I've seen them in real life.
1200002989.korean: 이런 건 시뮬레이터로만 돌려봤지 실제로는 처음 봐.

1200002990.english: If we ask Ada, maybe she knows how fast it is? Because they would have been watching from space.
1200002990.korean: 에이다에게 물어보면 속도가 얼만지 알 수 있지 않을까? 우주에서 지켜봤을 테니까.

1200002992.english: It looks like gold that was knocked out during the collision.

1200002993.english: There are a lot here and there too.

1200002994.english: Huh? This is an Alterium, isn't it?

1200002995.english: Is that the Alterium the Iron Worms have gathered?

1200002997.english: Doctor, look inside that hole over there.

1200002998.english: Hey, isn't that yellow glowing thing a vein?
1200002998.korean: 저기 노랗게 빛나는 거 광맥 아냐?

1200002999.english: Gold veins can't be that thick and obvious, can they?
1200002999.korean: 금 광맥이 저렇게 눈에 뻔히 보일 정도로 굵을 리가 없지?

1200003000.english: Did they build the Iron Tower on top of an Alterium vein?
1200003000.korean: 알터리움 광맥 위에 철의 탑을 세운건가?

1200003002.english: Let's think about it the other way around.

1200003003.english: They didn't build the Iron Tower on top of the Alterium vein...
1200003003.korean: 알터리움 광맥 위에 철의 탑을 세운 것이 아니라…

1200003004.english: Since we built the Iron Tower, what if an Alterium vein appeared?
1200003004.korean: 철의 탑을 세웠으니까 알터리움 광맥이 생겼다면?

1200003005.english: I've always wondered where Alterium came from...

1200003006.english: No, it's too early to jump to conclusions...

1200003008.english: If we can pinpoint the locations of the Alterium veins and the Iron Tower...
1200003008.korean: 알터리움 광맥과 철의 탑의 위치를 파악한다면…

1200003011.english: So you don't call me "Captain" anymore, do you...?

1200003013.english: Fafnir and we are both under the command of the commander!

1200003014.english: You didn't seriously expect to be treated like the boss, did you?
1200003014.korean: 설마 아직도 대장 대우 받으려고 하셨나요?

1200003015.english: It goes against the hierarchy, doesn't it?

1200003018.english: Take a jump. Is there gold coming out?

1200003019.english: It's gone! It's buried way down deep underground!
1200003019.korean: 없어! 지하 한참 밑에 다 파묻혔어!

1200003020.english: You know better than to say things like that!

1200003021.english: So, you can't buy it for us anymore?

1200003022.english: You've gone to the dogs, haven't you?

1200003024.english: I have some gold I smuggled out.

1200003025.english: What? Give it back! It's originally mine, isn't it?

1200003026.english: We haven't received our dividends, have we?

1200003027.english: I didn't even receive my severance pay, you know?

1200003029.english: Okay! Take it! Take it all! You bad people!
1200003029.korean: 그래! 가져가라! 다 가져가! 나쁜 것들아!

1200003030.english: Hehe, so we're going to buy it for you today.

1200003031.english: I'm going to the PX now, do you need anything?

1200003032.english: You've saved us, fed us, housed us, and protected us all this time.
1200003032.korean: 지금까지 우리 살려주고, 먹여주고, 재워주고, 보호해줬잖아.

1200003033.english: And you bought me a lot of things, didn't you? We were also planning to install amenities in Haka.
1200003033.korean: 그리고 이것저것 많이 사줬잖아. 하카에도 편의시설 설치해주려고 했고.

1200003034.english: He was a good leader, even if he was a fool.

1200003035.english: He was a good captain. Even tho I'm a fool.

1200003040.english: Are you crying? Fafnir, look up.

1200003041.english: You guys can't stand seeing people being moved...
1200003041.korean: 너희는 사람 감동하는 꼴을 못 보는구나…

1200003042.english: Is there something like that between us?

1200003043.english: Some people really have a lot of nerve.

1200003045.english: You guys are going to eat up all the gold!

1200003050.english: What's wrong? I'm glad to see you.
1200003050.korean: 왜 그래? 나는 널 봐서 기쁜데.

1200003052.english: I, I don't have any gold anymore!

1200003053.english: I know. Who cares what anyone says? It just means I'm happy to see it.
1200003053.korean: 알아. 누가 뭐래? 그냥 봐서 기쁘다는 건데.

1200003054.english: Whether they have a lot of gold or not, they are still a valued customer.
1200003054.korean: 금이 많든 적든 소중한 고객님이라는 건 변함이 없죠.

1200003055.english: I don't have any money, my subordinates buy it for me!
1200003055.korean: 나, 금 없어서 부하들이 사주는 거야!

1200003056.english: Well... since we've run into each other like this, it's fate.

1200003060.english: Sterling said not to follow someone who gives away gold for free.
1200003060.korean: 스털링이 공짜로 금 주는 사람 따라가지 말라고 했어.

1200003061.english: Am I being treated like a child...?

1200003062.english: Well, they say nothing is more expensive than something that's free.
1200003062.korean: 뭐, 공짜보다 비싼 건 없다고 하니까.

1200003064.english: ...It's not gold, so does it matter?

1200003067.english: Is it free even if you buy it?

1200003068.english: Whether you buy it yourself or someone buys it for you, the procedure is almost the same, right?
1200003068.korean: 사서 주는 거나, 공짜로 사주는 거나 절차상의 차이는 있어도 거의 똑같죠?

1200003070.english: Is that alcohol? Can you drink well?

1200003072.english: Well... if you're okay with it.

1200003074.korean: 왜? 난 술 마시면 안 돼?

1200003075.english: No. No, that's not it. I have something to tell you, Lord Fafnir.
1200003075.korean: 아뇨. 그게 아니라 파프니르 님에게 알려줄 것이 있답니다.

1200003079.english: Because he defended the Orca branch of the Three-Eyed Goods Trading Post from the Iron Blooded, Fafnir is provided with goods from the Orca branch of the Three-Eyed Goods Trading Post free of charge.
1200003079.korean: 철충으로부터 삼안 물자 영업소 오르카 지부를 지켰기에 파프니르에게는 삼안 물자 영업소 오르카 지부의 물건에 한정해서 무료로 제공한다.

1200003080.english: It's the judgment of the central AI at the Saman Materials Sales Office.
1200003080.korean: 삼안 물자 영업소 중앙 AI의 판단이에요.

1200003084.english: Hey guys! Pick out everything you want to buy!
1200003084.korean: 얘들아! 사고 싶은 거 다 골라!

1200003086.english: The Saman Materials Sales Office is more human than I expected, isn't it?

1200003087.english: Because the price of gold has gone up a lot thanks to you, Mr. Fafnir.
1200003087.korean: 파프니르 님 덕분에 금 가격이 많이 올랐으니까요.

1200003088.english: And later, we plan to excavate the 24,000 tons of gold buried in the ground.
1200003088.korean: 그리고 나중에 땅에 묻힌 24000톤의 금도 발굴할 계획이고요.

1200003089.english: Before that, I should be the one to suggest to the commander that we excavate for gold.
1200003089.korean: 그전에 내가 먼저 사령관한테 금 발굴하자고 말해야겠네.

1200003090.english: Huh? Does Orca have the luxury for that right now?
1200003090.korean: 어라? 지금 오르카가 그럴 여유가 있을까요?

1200003091.english: I don't know if you're with Orca or the Sanan Materials Sales Office.
1200003091.korean: 나는 네가 오르카 소속인지, 삼안 물자 영업소 소속인지 모르겠어.

1200003092.english: They both belong. So, I'm also telling you about the gold excavation plan.
1200003092.korean: 둘 다 속한답니다. 그러니까 금 발굴 계획도 알려드리는 거고요.

1200003099.english: I'll have to ask the other members for their understanding.

1200003100.english: And I should report to the central authority that the amount of goods provided to Lord Fafnir should also be limited to a certain amount per month.
1200003100.korean: 그리고 파프니르 님께 제공하는 상품은 한 달에 얼마씩 제한도 해야겠다고 중앙에 보고해야겠네요.

1200003101.english: Still, those bad inventories aren't being cleared...
1200003101.korean: 그래도 저 악성재고들은 처리가 안 되네요…

1200003102.english: Since we're talking about it, how about one?

1200003103.english: Sorry. I'm not too keen on that either...

1200003105.english: What am I going to do about that...?

1200003106.english: - I was asleep when I felt something climb onto my body, and I woke up.
1200003106.korean: - 자고 있던 나는 무언가가 내 몸 위에 올라탄 것을 느끼고 잠에서 깨어났다.

1200003111.english: It's my hobby to sleep curled up on top of treasure!
1200003111.korean: 보물 위에 엎드려 자는 게 내 취미라고!

1200003112.english: Of course. What treasure could be more precious than the last human?
1200003112.korean: 당연하지. 마지막 인간보다 더 귀한 보물이 어딨겠어?

1200003113.english: - I didn't ask how you got in.

1200003114.english: - Lilith probably knew Fafnir had entered my room, but she let it slide this time.
1200003114.korean: - 리리스는 파프니르가 내 방에 들어온 것을 알면서도 이번에는 묵인해줬겠지.

1200003115.english: - I noticed a certain smell coming from Fafnir.
1200003115.korean: - 나는 파프니르에게서 어떤 냄새가 나는 것을 알아차렸다.

1200003116.english: Yeah... I drank it. With my subordinates.

1200003117.english: - No wonder Fafnir's face is red and his body is a little warm.
1200003117.korean: - 어쩐지 파프니르의 얼굴이 붉고, 몸도 조금 뜨겁다.

1200003118.english: - Still, it wasn't a bad feeling.

1200003119.english: - Fafnir also seemed to be in a good mood.

1200003121.english: I'm going to make the last human my treasure.

1200003122.english: Of course! Because Fafnir will be the master of all the world's treasures!
1200003122.korean: 당연하지! 세상의 모든 보물의 주인이 될 파프니르니까!

1200003124.english: - We looked at each other for a moment and smiled.

1200003126.english: You're not treating me like an idiot, are you?

1200003127.english: No... no, it's okay if you do. Everyone treats me like an idiot anyway.
1200003127.korean: 아니… 아니, 해도 상관은 없고. 어차피 다 날 바보 취급하는 걸.

1200003133.english: - Fafnir is probably not as foolish as people think.
1200003133.korean: - 파프니르는 주위 생각처럼 바보는 아닐 것이다.

1200003134.english: - If Fafnir were truly foolish, he wouldn't have been able to lead his subordinates and gather so much treasure in a world after humanity's extinction. Even with the help of his subordinates.
1200003134.korean: - 파프니르가 정말로 바보였다면 인류가 멸망한 이후의 세계에서 부하들을 이끌고 그 많은 보물들을 모을 수 없었을 것이다. 부하들의 도움이 있다고 하더라도 말이다.

1200003135.english: - And considering the series of actions she took when she came to Orca, you couldn't think she was a fool.
1200003135.korean: - 그리고 그녀가 오르카에 오고 보여 준 일련의 행동들을 생각하면 바보라고 생각할 수 없었다.

1200003136.english: - The first time Fafnir's group contacted us, whenever the tension rose, she would step in and ease it.
1200003136.korean: - 파프니르 일행이 처음으로 우리와 접촉했을 때, 긴장감이 고조될 때마다 그녀는 행동에 나서서 긴장감을 완화했다.

1200003137.english: - Every time my subordinates asked for something, I'd say no at first, but eventually I'd give in.
1200003137.korean: - 부하들이 뭔가를 요구할 때마다 안된다고 말하면서 결국에는 들어줬다.

1200003138.english: - And when Orca needed Haka, she was happy to lend it.
1200003138.korean: - 그리고 오르카가 하카를 필요로 할 때 그녀는 기꺼이 하카를 대여해주었고.

1200003139.english: - When Orca was in danger, he drove the Haka with Sterling and brought down the Tower of Iron.
1200003139.korean: - 오르카가 위험에 빠지자 스털링과 함께 하카를 몰고 가서 철의 탑을 무너트렸다.

1200003140.english: It couldn't be called the actions of a fool.

1200003141.english: - It could be an overestimation. However, thanks to her being there, we were able to achieve the results we have today.
1200003141.korean: - 과대평가일 수도 있다. 하지만 그녀가 있었던 덕분에 지금의 결과를 얻을 수 있었다.

1200003143.english: You're not worried about the gold?

1200003144.english: It's not a waste! Of course it's not a waste! It's been haunting me so much before I go to sleep that it's blinding me!
1200003144.korean: 아깝지! 당연히 아깝지! 잠들기 전에 계속 눈에 아른거려서 눈이 부실 지경이라고!

1200003145.english: I worked so hard to collect that gold!
1200003145.korean: 내가 그 황금을 모으느라 얼마나 고생했는데!

1200003146.english: It's 24,000 tons! A whopping 20,000! 4,000 tons! And there were other treasures too! The dragon's nest itself was incredibly valuable!
1200003146.korean: 2만 4천 톤이야! 자그마치 2만! 4천 톤! 그리고 다른 보물들도 있었고! 용의 둥지 그 자체도 엄청 귀중한 거였다고!

1200003148.english: No, it's not completely okay, but it's okay.
1200003148.korean: 아니, 완전히 괜찮은 건 아니지만 그래도 괜찮아.

1200003149.english: Gold is just something you can gather again. You'll help, right? Hehe.
1200003149.korean: 황금은 다시 모으면 그만이니까. 도와줄 거지? 헤헤.

1200003150.english: And beside, you can't fly in the sky forever. Because Sterling was always nagging that he had to go down now, that he had to abandon the gold.
1200003150.korean: 그리고 영원히 하늘 위를 날아다닐 수도 없는 노릇이니까. 스털링이 이제 내려가야 한다고, 금을 버려야 한다고 맨날 닦달했으니까.

1200003151.english: Because thanks to coming down, I protected and gained something more precious than gold... no, something precious.
1200003151.korean: 내려온 덕분에 황금보다 더 귀중한 것… 아니, 소중한 것을 지키고 얻었으니까.

1200003152.english: Even if I'm a complete idiot, I know the difference between something valuable and something precious.
1200003152.korean: 내가 아무리 바보라도 귀중한 것과 소중한 것이 다르다는 건 알아.

1200003153.english: Even if you gave me all the precious treasures in the world... I would never trade them for my precious treasure.
1200003153.korean: 세상의 모든 귀중한 보물을 줘도… 소중한 보물과는 절대로 바꾸지 않을거야.

1200003154.english: - I didn't ask what her precious treasure was. Because there was no need for water. She was willing to give up her treasure for something precious to her. Bathhouses, arcades, movie theaters, and various items.
1200003154.korean: - 나는 그녀의 소중한 보물이 뭔지 묻지 않았다. 물을 필요가 없었기 때문이다. 그녀는 자신의 소중한 것을 위해 기꺼이 보물을 내놓았다. 목욕탕, 오락실, 영화관 그리고 여러 물건들.

1200003155.english: - She lost Haka, the Dragon's Nest, and many treasures, but thanks to that, she didn't lose what was precious.
1200003155.korean: - 그녀는 하카, 용의 둥지와 많은 보물들을 잃었지만 덕분에 소중한 것들을 잃지 않았다.
